name: bowling-list-maker
description: Web app mobile-first per ordini settimanali di magazzino.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace api" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace frontend && rm -rf dist && cp -R frontend/dist dist
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace api && npm run typecheck --workspace frontend
